name: Terminal World NEXT
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>端末世界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ターミナルワールド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＮＥＸＴ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネクスト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card if your opponent controls 3 or fewer monsters and 3 or fewer Spell/Trap Cards, while you control no other cards. Cards cannot be placed on the field if it would give any player more than 3 monsters or more than 3 Spell/Trap Cards on their field.
eff: Activate this card if your opponent controls 3 or fewer monsters and 3 or fewer Spell/Trap Cards, while you control no other cards. Cards cannot be placed on the field if it would give any player more than 3 monsters or more than 3 Spell/Trap Cards on their field.

action: Prevents the player placing cards on the field
Prevents the opponent placing cards on the field
mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
